# Blow MU CMS - UI/UX Redesign Implementation Plan
# Phases: 8 | Files: 33 (32 modified + 1 new) | Generated by Autopilot Phase 1

## Phase 1: Foundation (colors, config, HTML, bug fixes)

### Task 1.1 ‚Äî Rewrite color palette in `colors.ts`
**File:** `/client/src/public/colors.ts`
Full rewrite: remove green/blue/pink/old primary. New exports:
- `primary` (Antique Gold): 50:#FFF9E6 ‚Üí 950:#2C2005, 500:#D4A017
- `accent` (Crimson): 50:#FFF1F0 ‚Üí 950:#3B0A0A, 500:#DC2626
- `neutral` (Obsidian warm): 50:#F7F5F3 ‚Üí 950:#0F0D0B, 900:#1A1714
- `background`: DEFAULT:#F7F5F3, dark:#0F0D0B
- `surface`: glass/glassBorder/glassHover rgba values
- `text`: DEFAULT:#EDEBE8
Keep `export const colors = { ... } as const;`

### Task 1.2 ‚Äî Update Tailwind config
**File:** `/client/tailwind.config.js`
1. fontFamily: remove `cinzel-decorative`, add `display: ['Cormorant Garamond', 'Cinzel', 'serif']`
2. extend.boxShadow: add glow-sm/glow/glow-lg with gold rgba
3. extend.keyframes: add fade-up, glow-pulse, shimmer
4. extend.animation: add fade-up, glow-pulse, shimmer entries

### Task 1.3 ‚Äî Update index.html
**File:** `/client/index.html`
1. Remove Cinzel Decorative Google Font link
2. Add Cormorant Garamond: `family=Cormorant+Garamond:wght@400;600;700&display=swap`
3. Change body dark class: `dark:bg-neutral-900` ‚Üí `dark:bg-neutral-950`

### Task 1.4 ‚Äî Fix Button.tsx bugs
**File:** `/client/src/components/Button/Button.tsx`
1. Fix `ap-1` typo ‚Üí `gap-1`
2. Fix inverted sizes: `size === 'large' ? 'h-9' : 'h-11'` ‚Üí `size === 'large' ? 'h-11' : 'h-9'`

## Phase 2: Type System

### Task 2.1 ‚Äî Rewrite Typography.tsx variant map
**File:** `/client/src/components/Typography/Typography.tsx`
Add new variants: display-1, display-2, h1-h4, body-lg/body-lg-medium/body/body-medium/body-sm/body-sm-medium, label-lg/label/label-sm/caption
Keep ALL old variants as aliases (for backward compat during migration).
Default fallback: `'body-lg'`

## Phase 3: Structural Components

### Task 3.1 ‚Äî Create Card.tsx (new component)
**File:** `/client/src/components/Card/Card.tsx`
Props: `{ children, variant?: 'default'|'elevated', styles?: string, hover?: boolean }`
default: `bg-white/80 dark:bg-white/[0.04] backdrop-blur-xl rounded-xl border border-neutral-200 dark:border-white/[0.08] shadow-sm px-6 py-4`
elevated: `bg-white dark:bg-white/[0.06] backdrop-blur-2xl rounded-xl border border-neutral-200 dark:border-white/[0.12] shadow-lg dark:shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)] px-6 py-4`
hover=true adds: `transition-shadow duration-300 hover:shadow-glow`
